vocab.example: As a bit of a horological enthusiast, I never leave the house without a mechanical watch on my wrist.

vocab.meaning: một món đồ thiết yếu trong tủ đồ
vocab.example: A classic timepiece has become a staple of my wardrobe, complementing both formal and casual outfits.

vocab.meaning: sự chính xác về mặt thời gian
vocab.example: I rely on my watch for chronological precision, especially during exams when every second counts.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn những thiết kế tối giản
vocab.example: I usually opt for minimalist designs because they offer a sense of understated sophistication.

vocab.meaning: bộ máy cơ học (của đồng hồ)
vocab.example: I am fascinated by the intricate mechanical movement inside traditional watches, which I find far more soul than digital ones.
